summary: Frontend testing of Reports page (Raporlar) - Complete redesign with 19 report sections. All navigation items and sections are working correctly. Mobile responsive view with dropdown selector is functional.

ui_bugs.issue: Unicode encoding issue - Turkish characters displaying as escape sequences (e.g., '\u00f6' instead of 'ö', '\u0131' instead of 'ı'). Visible in section titles like 'Genel Bak\u0131\u015f' instead of 'Genel Bakış'
Search input in Guests section has visibility issues - element exists but fill action times out due to element not being visible

issues: Unicode characters not rendering properly in KPI card titles and section headers

action_items: Fix Unicode encoding for Turkish characters in BasicReports.jsx - ensure proper UTF-8 rendering for characters like ö, ı, ş, ğ, ü, ç
Investigate guest search input visibility issue in Guests section
critical_code_review_comments: Unicode escape sequences in JSX strings should be replaced with actual Turkish characters or proper Unicode handling
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reports page has 19 sections across 10 categories. All navigation works. Mobile view uses dropdown selector. Main issue is Unicode encoding for Turkish characters.

features_tested.reports_page_loads: PASS - Page loads at /app/raporlar with sidebar navigation
features_tested.sidebar_categories: PASS - All 10 category headers visible: GENEL, GELİR & FİNANS, DOLULUK & KAPASİTE, MİSAFİR, ÖN BÜRO, OPERASYON, KANAL & PAZAR, FİNANS & MUHASEBE, RESMİ RAPORLAR, DEPARTMANLAR, F&B
features_tested.kpi_cards: PASS - 12 KPI cards found with proper data
features_tested.charts: PASS - Revenue trend, occupancy trend, and pie charts render properly
features_tested.guest_list_table: PASS - Table shows data with columns
features_tested.guest_search: PARTIAL - Input exists but has visibility issues
features_tested.tc_passport_column: PASS - Visible in Official and Police sections
features_tested.mobile_responsive: PASS - Select dropdown appears on small screens
features_tested.rapor_olusturucu_link: PASS - Link to /app/rapor-olusturucu present in sidebar
